_note: Two worked examples. Input uses compact pipe format. RULE: always state error_logs count in finding. Never say 'No errors' when error_logs > 0.

example_ok_with_minor_logs.input:
ns=vroom-dev window=10m
svc|rps|err%|p99s|errlogs
user-service|9.1|0.0|0.31|0
ride-service|6.3|0.4|0.55|2
dispatch-service|5.1|0.0|0.09|0
notification-service|7.8|0.0|0.19|2

output.summary: All services within thresholds. ride-service and notification-service each show 2 error log entries (below WARN threshold of 10) — worth monitoring.

services.name: user-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.0% error rate, p99=0.31s.

services.name: ride-service
services.finding: Within thresholds. 2 error logs (below WARN>10), 0.4% error rate, p99=0.55s.

services.name: dispatch-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.0% error rate, p99=0.09s.

services.name: notification-service
services.finding: Within thresholds. 2 error logs (below WARN>10), 0.0% error rate, p99=0.19s.

recommendations: Monitor ride-service and notification-service error log trend — currently 2 each; escalation warrants investigation.
No immediate action required; all metrics within thresholds.

example_crit.input:
ns=vroom-dev window=30m
svc|rps|err%|p99s|errlogs
user-service|10.2|0.1|0.31|0
ride-service|7.4|6.8|4.2|89
dispatch-service|5.1|0.0|0.09|0
notification-service|8.3|0.3|0.22|1

output.summary: ride-service critically degraded: 6.8% error rate (CRIT>5%), 89 error logs (CRIT>50). notification-service has 1 error log — within thresholds.

services.name: user-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.1% error rate, p99=0.31s.

services.name: ride-service
services.finding: CRITICAL. 89 error logs (CRIT>50), 6.8% error rate (CRIT>5%), p99=4.2s.

services.name: dispatch-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.0% error rate, p99=0.09s.

services.name: notification-service
services.finding: Within thresholds. 1 error log (below WARN>10), 0.3% error rate, p99=0.22s.

recommendations: Investigate ride-service immediately — check PostgreSQL for lock contention or Redis Stream consumer lag.
Consider restarting ride-service pod if error rate does not drop within 5 minutes.
Review notification-service logs for the single error entry as a precaution.
